Emperor Entertainment Hotel ( (HK:0296) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Emperor Entertainment Hotel Limited reported a decrease in total revenue to HK$335.6 million for the six months ending September 2025, compared to HK$407.9 million in the previous year.
